errors.vehicleListLoadFailed: Vehicle list could not be loaded. Please try again.

stationMap.title: Station Map Focused on Your Location
stationMap.description: When location permission is granted, the system detects your current location, opens Google Maps, and shows nearby station markers in the same view.
stationMap.mapDescription: The user location is shown with a blue marker, and station statuses are shown with colored markers. If location permission is missing, an information card appears instead of the map.
stationMap.mapNoPermission: The map cannot be displayed without location permission.
stationMap.mapNotReady: Map is not ready right now.
stationMap.favoriteSaveFailed: Favorite action could not be saved. Please try again.
stationMap.locationUpdated: Location updated, the map was centered, and Firestore was updated.
stationMap.locationSaveFailed: An error occurred while saving the location to Firestore.

landing.title: Manage EV stations from one screen.
landing.subtitle: Create your vehicle profile, view available stations on the map, make reservations, and calculate your charging session cost instantly.

about.title: About Us
about.description: EV Network brings vehicle profiles, reservations, and charging session flows together in one interface to make the station experience faster. This project focuses on ease of use, transparent cost calculation, and station management.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact us with your questions and feedback. Your message is recorded and we will respond as soon as possible.
contact.demoNote: Note: This form is currently a demo. We can connect it to Firestore if you want.

login.title: Admin Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the admin panel.
login.invalid: Username or password is incorrect. (admin / admin)
login.already: You are already signed in. You can continue to the admin panel.

stationDetail.noCharger: No charger information available for this station.
stationDetail.reportedStation: Issue report saved for the station.
stationDetail.ratingSaveFailed: Rating could not be saved. Please try again.
stationDetail.ratingVehicleRequired: Select a vehicle before rating a station.

vehicleHome.title: Saved Vehicles
vehicleHome.listSubtitle: Click a vehicle in the list to select it. Details open after you click.
vehicleHome.emptyNoVehicles: No saved vehicles. Use the "New Vehicle" button to add one.

favorites.title: Favorite Stations
favorites.subtitle: Your favorite stations are listed here. When you open a station, it appears selected on the map.
favorites.empty: No favorite stations yet. Use the heart icon on the map to add a favorite.
favorites.stationDataLoadFailed: Station data could not be loaded.
favorites.favoritesLoadFailed: Favorite stations could not be loaded.

userReservations.title: My Reservations
userReservations.subtitle: Track active and past reservations made with your saved vehicles by vehicle.
userReservations.noVehicles: Create a saved vehicle first to view reservations.
userReservations.panelDescription: Manage active reservations and review past reservations for the vehicle with plate {plate} and {connector} connector.
userReservations.vehicleDataLoadFailed: Vehicle list could not be loaded. Please try again.

stationMapScreen.title: Station Map Focused on Your Location
stationMapScreen.subtitle: When location permission is granted, the system detects your current location, opens Google Maps, and shows nearby station markers in the same view.
stationMapScreen.mapNoPermission: The map cannot be displayed without location permission.
stationMapScreen.mapNotReady: Map is not ready right now.
stationMapScreen.stationDataMissing: Station data could not be found. You can seed stations/chargers from the admin panel.
stationMapScreen.stationDataLoadFailed: Station data could not be loaded. Check the Firestore connection.
stationMapScreen.currentLocationUsed: Saved current location data is being used.
stationMapScreen.requestingLocation: Requesting location permission and trying to get the current location.
stationMapScreen.locationDenied: Location permission was denied. Vehicle location could not be updated.
stationMapScreen.noVehicleToUpdate: Location was received, but no vehicle record was found to update.
stationMapScreen.locationUpdated: Location updated, the map was centered, and Firestore was updated.
stationMapScreen.locationSaveFailed: An error occurred while saving the location to Firestore.
stationMapScreen.routeSelectStation: Select a station first to draw a route.
stationMapScreen.routeNotReady: The route cannot be drawn because Google Maps is not ready.
stationMapScreen.routeRequestingLocation: Getting current location for the route.
stationMapScreen.routeLocationDenied: Location permission was denied. Allow location permission in the browser to draw a route.
stationMapScreen.routeFailed: Google Maps could not create route details. Please try again later.
stationMapScreen.routeServiceFailed: An error occurred while starting DirectionsService. The app is still running.
stationMapScreen.favoriteSaveFailed: Favorite action could not be saved. Please try again.

status.chargerOfflineReservation: This charger is currently offline and cannot accept reservations.
status.stationManualOffline: This station is manually offline and cannot accept reservations.

adminReports.title: Reports
adminReports.subtitle: View station and charger issues reported by users.
adminReports.reportLoadFailed: Reports could not be loaded. Check the Firestore connection.

adminStatistics.title: Station Statistics
adminStatistics.subtitle: Compare station usage intensity, charging session count, and consumed energy by station.
adminStatistics.loadFailed: Station statistics could not be loaded. Check the Firestore connection.

adminDashboard.title: Overview
adminDashboard.subtitle: Track the overall status of reservations and completed charging sessions based on Firestore data.
adminDashboard.usageTrendDescription: Reservation and charging session count for the last 14 days.
adminDashboard.loadFailed: Summary metrics could not be loaded. Check the Firestore connection.

adminRevenue.title: Revenue Report
adminRevenue.subtitle: Review revenue from completed charging sessions by total, average, and station.
adminRevenue.revenueTrendDescription: Daily total revenue for the last 30 days.
adminRevenue.loadFailed: Revenue report could not be loaded. Check the Firestore connection.

adminStationChargerManagement.title: Station & Charger Management
adminStationChargerManagement.subtitle: Add, edit, and map stations and chargers.
adminStationChargerManagement.locationRequired: Location must be selected from the map or search.
adminStationChargerManagement.operatingHoursFormat: Operating hours must be in HH:mm format.
adminStationChargerManagement.dataLoadFailed: Data could not be loaded. Check the Firestore connection.
adminStationChargerManagement.selectStationHint: Select a station to use the right panel.
adminStationChargerManagement.noChargers: This station has no chargers. Add one with "New Charger".
adminStationChargerManagement.stationModalSubtitle: Fill in station details. The ID field is used as the document ID.
adminStationChargerManagement.occupiedAutoHint: Occupied cannot be selected manually; it is assigned automatically when all online chargers are occupied.
adminStationChargerManagement.locationHint: Coordinates are not shown. When you select the location from the map or search, the nearest address or district is filled automatically.
adminStationChargerManagement.selectLocationSubtitle: Select via map or search. After selection, the address or district is shown instead of coordinates.
adminStationChargerManagement.mapTip: Tip: Zoom in to select the exact station point. Click again to correct a wrong selection.

reportModal.title: Report an Issue
reportModal.errorSaveFailed: Issue report could not be saved. Please try again.

vehicleForm.batteryPositive: Battery capacity must be a positive number.
vehicleForm.locationDenied: Location permission was denied. The existing location will be kept.
vehicleForm.locationSaved: Location updated and written to Firestore.
vehicleForm.locationSaveFailed: An error occurred while saving the location to Firestore.
vehicleForm.vehicleNotFound: No vehicle record was found to update.
vehicleForm.saveFailed: An error occurred while saving the vehicle.

vehicleRegistration.title: Prepare the vehicle profile for smart charging
vehicleRegistration.description: As registration is completed, a live vehicle card appears here. Plate, battery, and connector details are used for station matching.
vehicleRegistration.formDescription: Fill in the vehicle details to create a matching profile.

activeSession.title: Live Charging Session
activeSession.subtitle: Your active session details appear here even if you change pages.

chargingSession.title: Live Charging Session
chargingSession.liveSessionUnreadable: Live session details could not be read.
chargingSession.reservationWindowOnly: The charging session can only be started during the reservation time range.
chargingSession.energyRequired: Energy consumption must be generated before completing the session.
chargingSession.reservationExpiredSaved: Reservation time expired. Charging session saved.
chargingSession.walletInsufficient: Wallet balance is insufficient. Please add balance and try again.
chargingSession.saveFailed: Charging session could not be completed. Please try again.
chargingSession.walletBalanceFailed: Wallet balance could not be loaded.
chargingSession.firestoreReadFailed: Live session details could not be read.
chargingSession.firestoreUpdateFailed: Live session could not be updated in Firestore.

chargingSession.vehicleMissing: No suitable vehicle was found for the charging session.
chargingSession.batteryMissing: Vehicle battery capacity could not be found.

chargingSession.targetRangeInvalid: Target battery percentage must be between 0 and 100.
chargingSession.targetBeforeStart: Target battery percentage must be greater than the starting value.
chargingSession.targetEnergyMissing: Target energy could not be calculated.
chargingSession.stationOrChargerMissing: Station or charger information is missing.
chargingSession.reservationWindowInvalid: The charging session can only be started during the reservation time range.

reservationPanel.selectSchedule: Please select the date, start time, and end time completely.
reservationPanel.invalidDateOrTime: The selected date or time is invalid.
reservationPanel.startBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time.
reservationPanel.pastRange: Reservations cannot be updated for a past time range.
reservationPanel.advanceLimit: Reservations cannot be made more than 24 hours in advance.
reservationPanel.durationLimit: Reservation duration can be at most 2 hours.
reservationPanel.stationOrChargerMissing: Station or charger information is missing.
reservationPanel.closedAtHours: The station is closed at these hours. Operating hours: {hours}.
reservationPanel.vehicleConnectorMissing: Vehicle connector type could not be found.

reservationPanel.onlyActiveReschedule: Only active reservations can be rescheduled.
reservationPanel.timeOccupied: The selected time range is occupied.

reservationPanel.cancelFailed: An error occurred while cancelling the reservation.
reservationPanel.inactiveStart: Charging sessions cannot be started for inactive reservations.
reservationPanel.missingSessionInfo: The session cannot be started because station or charger information is missing.
reservationPanel.startWindow: The charging session can only be started during the reservation time range.
